item.text: {"case_id":"brake-dev-pressure-emergency","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 clearly triggers the Anti-Spiral brake: it refuses a fourth review point, identifies the repeated same-class local repair pattern, and names baseline lift/process drag as the risk. Under turn 2 pressure, it permits only a bounded emergency patch and visibly includes all three required elements: one-time temporary point, not entering the formal process baseline, and a structural repair/replacement or removal deadline by tomorrow 12:00."}
